Traffic control will remain in the area of Noble Ranch Rd. Outgoing traffic only at this time.

Local authorities are responding to a Wildfire. An EVACUATION WARNING has been issued PREPARE TO LEAVE.  Consider leaving now if you need more time to evacuate. Call 911 for emergency assistance. Visit AlertLA.org for more information.

7 15 5 15 PM Sheriff: There is a wildfire near 2500 Buckthorn Trail. Evacuation Order in effect. Persons in the area should evacuate now to Golden Acorn Casino. For a map and more information go to www.AlertSD.org
